title: Define static catalog export contract
goal: Bind the Commonworld static catalog export contract PR as a read-only, no-runtime/no-write-path export contract task before API or ingestion work.

acceptance.assertion: A static catalog export schema defines deterministic public catalog entries without introducing an API runtime.
A sample export validates against the schema and preserves deterministic entry order.
The contract explicitly excludes API server, database, ingestion worker, public submissions and write paths.

validated_acceptance.export-schema: PR #24 defines catalog-export schema and deterministic public catalog entry contract.
validated_acceptance.proof-sample: PR #24 adds a proof sample derived from the seed manifest and validates deterministic entry order.
validated_acceptance.read-only-boundary: PR #24 explicitly excludes API server, database, ingestion worker, public submissions and write paths.

validation: No API server, database, ingestion worker, public submissions or write path introduced according to PR body and contract boundary.
